questions.question_text:
Choose the correct form of verb to fill in the blank.
Will the union leader ______ ?

Choose the appropriate preposition to complete the sentence:
The young child carried the heavy bucket ______ the stairs.
Pick out the correctly spelt word.

Identify the correct form of indirect speech of the following sentence.
Arpit says. "She is an intelligent girl".
options: Arpit says that she is an intelligent girl.
Arpit said that she is an intelligent girl.
Arpit said that she was an intelligent girl.
Arpit asked him if she is an intelligent girl.

questions.question_text:
Rearrange the following parts of a sentence labeled as PQRS to make a meaningful sentence
P Your hope for
Q if money is
R never have it
S independence you will
Pick out the antonym of 'spoil'.

Pick out the meaning of underlined idiom in the following sentence.
The judge called for an explanation of his misconduct.

Choose the correct passive voice form of the following sentence:
You can take it away.
options: You have the choice to take it away.

questions.question_text:
Pick out the synonym of the following word.
Languid

options: They never go on holiday, do they?
They never go on holiday, don't they?
They never go on holiday, haven't they?
They never go on holiday, did they?

D, E, F, G, H, I are six persons sitting around hexagonal table, each at one corner and facing the center of the table. D is second to the left of I. E is the neighbour of F and G. H is second to the left of G. Find who are the neighbours of H.

Of the 100 students in a class, anyone who chooses to study English also studies computer science. However, no student choose to study English and Physics. 16 students do Physics and computer Science. All the students do at least one of the three subjects. No. of students who study only one subject is more than students who study more than one subject. What are the maximum number of students who could have studied Physics only?

Electric Mixer

Each duopolist assumes that the other keeps its quality constant

As the prices decrease, the revenues earned by producers decrease

questions.question_text: Aggregate demand is -
options: Negatively related to the price level because a decline in the price level has a negative effect on the demand for output.
Negatively related to the price level because a decline in the price level has a positive effect on the demand for output.
Positively related to the price level because a decline in the price level has a negative effect on the demand for output.
Positively related to the price level because a decline in the price level has a positive effect on the demand for output.

options: Positively related to output and the rate of interest.
Inversely related to output and the rate of interest.
Inversely related to output and Positively related to the rate of interest.
Positively related to output and inversely related to the rate of interest.

questions.question_text: The user cost of capital is:
options: The real rate of interest plus the rate of depreciation
The nominal rate of interest plus the rate of depreciation

A change in an exogenous variable is classified as an autonomous change.

questions.question_text: According to the Phillips curve, unemployment will return to the natural rate when :
options: Normal wages are equal to expected wages.
Real wages are back at long-run equilibrium level.
Nominal wages are growing faster than inflation.
Inflation is higher than the growth of nominal wages.

questions.question_text: Assertion A: There is automatic change in the net tax revenue when level of output changes. Reason R: Automatic stabilization moderate aggregate spending in times of boom and slow down.

questions.question_text: Country A requires 2 units of labour to produce a unit of X and 5 units to produce a unit of Y; country B require 3 units of labour for X and 6 units for Y.
options: A has absolute advantage in the production of good X as well as Y
B has absolute advantage in the production of both good X and Y
Though A has an absolute advantage in both, it has a comparative advantage in Y
Though B has an absolute advantage in both, it has comparative advantage in X

questions.question_text: According to the Pareto Criterion, a movement from state A to state B is desirable:
options: if all agents are at least as well off in B as they were in A and at least one of them is better off.
if all agents are at least as well off in B as they were in A and no one is better off.
if the agent with lower welfare are found to improve their welfare in B in comparison to A...
if in B all the agents are having lower difference in their level of utilities
